sourceRef.citation: Kourovka Notebook, Problem 3.15 (Khukhro & Mazurov eds., ed.3)

statement.latex: A group$G$is said to be$U$-embed\-dable\/ in a class${ K}$of groups if, for any finite submodel$M G$, there is a group$A { K}$such that$M$is isomorphic to some submodel of$A$. Are the following groups$U$-embed\-dable in the class of finite groups: every group with one defining relation? every group defined by one relation in the variety of soluble groups of a given derived length? { M.\,I.\,Kargap...

reiAssessment.solveRationale: Group theory I_INFINITE_SEARCH; Rei not specialized in group theory (yet)
reiAssessment.formalizationNotes: Kourovka problems are typically research-level group theory
